memoryArtifacts.headline: Hugh's Jobs
memoryArtifacts.description:
Hugh Pakenham was the son of John de Pakenham and Joan (?). He married Constance de la Hay, daughter of Richard de la Hay.1 He died circa 1478.

     He was Lord of the Manor of Eastcourt, Finchamp …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Pakenham ,Sheriff Of Wiltshire於1410年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可帕克南時，他的父親John Pakenham31歲，母親Joan Hinde46歲。他於大約1426年與Constance de la Hay在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1478年1月在英國英格蘭肯特哈特雷 白 可藍別盧可享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Pakenham ,Sheriff Of Wiltshire于1410年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可帕克南时，他的父亲John Pakenham31岁，母亲Joan Hinde46岁。他于大约1426年与Constance de la Hay在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1478年1月在英国英格兰肯特哈特雷 白 可藍別盧可享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pakenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Pakenham (Suffolk). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Pacca (genitive Paccan) + hām ‘village, homestead’.
History: A family of this name has been established in Westmeath, Ireland, since the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Pakenham ,Sheriff Of Wiltshire was born in 1410, in Pakenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Pakenham, was 31 and his mother, Joan Hinde, was 46. He married Constance de la Hay about 1426, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in January 1478, in Hartley by Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Pakenham ,Sheriff Of Wiltshire est né en 1410, à Pakenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Pakenham, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan Hinde, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Constance de la Hay environ 1426, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en janvier 1478, à Hartley by Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans.

ko.Hartley, Kent, England, United Kingdom: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 하틀리 비 크랜브룩
ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Pakenham ,Sheriff Of Wiltshire(이)가 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 팍함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Pakenham(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Hinde(은)는 46세였다. 그는 대략 1426년 영국에서 Constance de la Hay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1478년 1월 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 하틀리 비 크랜브룩에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Constance de la Hay aproximadamente 1426, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Hartley, Kent, England, United Kingdom: хартли би кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Pakenham ,Sheriff Of Wiltshire родился в 1410 г. в местности пеикенам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Pakenham было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Hinde, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Constance de la Hay около 1426 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер январь 1478 г. в местности хартли би кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет.
